Issues: The image is a basic concept illustration. While stylistically appealing (cyberpunk/sci-fi), it lacks the complexity, unique composition, or high-fidelity detail often required for high commercial sales in stock art or print markets.
The composition is straightforward, relying on repeating geometric shapes (buildings) which, while effective for mood, might limit its broad commercial appeal unless sold as specific asset packs.
The lighting and coloring are moody but rely heavily on simple contrast. To increase commercial appeal, more sophisticated atmospheric effects or unique color grading would be beneficial.
The technical skill is adequate for a concept piece but doesn't exhibit the highly polished execution needed to command high prices in competitive digital art markets.
